title: phreatia negrosiana
intro: Phreatia negrosiana is a type of orchid native to the Philippines, specifically found in the Negros Island, and is also known as the Negros orchid. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Phreatia negrosiana include reducing inflammation, fighting bacterial and fungal infections, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are applied topically or taken orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
